note: Post-rehab consolidation full eval on the discrete-attention checkpoint. Supersedes pre-rehab soft-attention summaries (computed on a non-functional model).

stage3.note: robust across seeds and the default + 0.25 reduced-shaping checkpoint family; complete zero-shaping is a separate failing stress test

stage4b.disposition: Not supported in base config (causal feedback path disabled). Emergence is Phase 3.

stage6b.disposition: bounded positive: controller state beats capacity-matched observation on positive recall for all four gated signals, but revisit/allocation_error have marginally negative accuracy advantage, so the stricter capacity audit does not pass. Provisional.

reduced_shaping.disposition: Bounded resilience at weight 0.25 (acc 0.34 > static); complete zero-shaping collapses to ~static (0.19) and is NOT supported. min_accuracy threshold raised to 0.25 (above static).

perturbational_complexity.disposition: First non-reportability evidence family. Rich-but-recoverable dynamics: perturbation propagates to later attention far more than a no-recurrence control, and the state partially recovers unlike a frozen-state control. Bounded support, single checkpoint.

noise_floor_calibration.disposition: Empirical permuted-label noise floor for Stage 6A. Real controller-vs-observation accuracy advantages (~0.38, ~0.42) are ~100x above the permuted-label p95 floor (~0.004, ~0.003), with the null centered at ~0. The Stage 6A claim is significant, not a probe-capacity artifact. Replaces hardcoded directional thresholds for the strong report signals.
